visa_types.name: Tourist/Businessperson
visa_types.documents_required:
Tourist Visa
Transit Visa
Business/Commerce/Conference/Seminar/Meeting/Festival/Fair/Exhibition
Official Visit/Special Visit
Visit to Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus
Sportive/Cultural/Artistic Activity 
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Must not be taken more than 6 months before application time
- 5 x 5 cm
- Colour photo with white background
- Depicting the full face including ears with the face clearly visible. Please do not use any textured paper to print the photo.
- It is to be taken without headgear, hat/cap and spectacles.
Please note the Embassy may request for a new photo if it does not meet the specifications.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[tur > idn > en > Table:Business> Visa Fees 1]
Important Note:
- A portion of the total service fee (IDR 1401000) will be charged online when you book your appointment. You will pay the remaining amount at our offices via cash, UPI or POS payment (credit card, debit card).
- All fees are non-refundable under all circumstances
- Exact amount of Visa fees must be paid in USD in cash
- Service and Value Added Service fee can be paid in Indonesian Rupiah
visa_types.processing_time:
The time required for the visa application process until issuance, assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of 15 calendar days from the day the application is received.
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Embassy of Türkiye or VFS Global Türkiye Visa Application Center.
Early application
The earliest you can apply is 90 days before your travel date. Please verify your travel date before booking your appointment.
Rescheduling Due to Travel Dates
If you realize on the day of your appointment that your travel date falls outside the 90-day policy, you can reschedule the appointment one time.
visa_types.forms:
Immigration Checklist
Undertaking and Information Form For Entering Türkiye
Visa Application Form 

Applicants travelling to Türkiye are required to complete the Undertaking and Information Form as part of the visa application process. Please download the form using the link provided below. 
Instructions for Applicants 
- Download the Undertaking and Information Form from the website. 
- Fill in all required fields accurately and completely. 
- Print the form once it is fully completed. 
- Provide a wet (handwritten) signature on the designated section of the form. 
- Bring the original signed form with you when visiting the Visa Application Centre (VAC) for your appointment.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
Tourist refers to travel undertaken for leisure, recreation, and personal enjoyment. The purposes of travel are usually for relaxation, adventure, sightseeing, cultural immersion, recreation, and exploration.
Businessperson Commercial visits, meetings, trade shows, business negotiations, establishing a business (not working for an employer).
Important Distinction: Business Visa vs. Work Permit
- A Business Visa is to facilitate business (e.g., business meetings/commerce, seminars, conferences, sportive activities, official visit, etc.).
- A Work Permit (and Work Annotated Visa) is required if you intend to be employed in Turkey, involving a more complex application process with your employer in Turkey
Purpose of Visit
- Touristic
- Single Transit
- Double Transit
- Business Meeting / Commerce
- Conference / Seminar / Meeting
- Festival / Fair / Exhibition
- Sportive Activity
- Cultural / Artistic Activity
- Official Visit
- Visit to Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus
- Visit / Special
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
Tourist refers to travel undertaken for leisure, recreation, and personal enjoyment. The purposes of travel are usually for relaxation, adventure, sightseeing, cultural immersion, recreation, and exploration.
Businessperson Commercial visits, meetings, trade shows, business negotiations, establishing a business (not working for an employer).
Important Distinction: Business Visa vs. Work Permit
- A Business Visa is to facilitate business (e.g., business meetings/commerce, seminars, conferences, sportive activities, official visit, etc.).
- A Work Permit (and Work Annotated Visa) is required if you intend to be employed in Turkey, involving a more complex application process with your employer in Turkey
Purpose of Visit
- Touristic
- Single Transit
- Double Transit
- Business Meeting / Commerce
- Conference / Seminar / Meeting
- Festival / Fair / Exhibition
- Sportive Activity
- Cultural / Artistic Activity
- Official Visit
- Visit to Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus
- Visit / Special

## Visa Fees

[tur > idn > en > Table:Business> Visa Fees 1]
Important Note:
- A portion of the total service fee (IDR 1401000) will be charged online when you book your appointment. You will pay the remaining amount at our offices via cash, UPI or POS payment (credit card, debit card).
- All fees are non-refundable under all circumstances
- Exact amount of Visa fees must be paid in USD in cash
- Service and Value Added Service fee can be paid in Indonesian Rupiah

## Documents Required
Tourist Visa
Transit Visa
Business/Commerce/Conference/Seminar/Meeting/Festival/Fair/Exhibition
Official Visit/Special Visit
Visit to Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus
Sportive/Cultural/Artistic Activity 
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Must not be taken more than 6 months before application time
- 5 x 5 cm
- Colour photo with white background
- Depicting the full face including ears with the face clearly visible. Please do not use any textured paper to print the photo.
- It is to be taken without headgear, hat/cap and spectacles.
Please note the Embassy may request for a new photo if it does not meet the specifications.

## Processing Time
The time required for the visa application process until issuance, assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of 15 calendar days from the day the application is received.
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Embassy of Türkiye or VFS Global Türkiye Visa Application Center.
Early application
The earliest you can apply is 90 days before your travel date. Please verify your travel date before booking your appointment.
Rescheduling Due to Travel Dates
If you realize on the day of your appointment that your travel date falls outside the 90-day policy, you can reschedule the appointment one time.

## Download Forms
Immigration Checklist
Undertaking and Information Form For Entering Türkiye
Visa Application Form 

Applicants travelling to Türkiye are required to complete the Undertaking and Information Form as part of the visa application process. Please download the form using the link provided below. 
Instructions for Applicants 
- Download the Undertaking and Information Form from the website. 
- Fill in all required fields accurately and completely. 
- Print the form once it is fully completed. 
- Provide a wet (handwritten) signature on the designated section of the form. 
- Bring the original signed form with you when visiting the Visa Application Centre (VAC) for your appointment.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Employment Visa (Work Visa) is authorization for a foreigner to legally work in Turkey for a specific employer, requiring both an approved work permit from the Ministry of Labor and a special visa sticker in your passport for entry, usually processed by the employer. It's tied to a job offer, and the Turkish company sponsors the work permit application on your behalf after you get the job, making the permit serve as your residence permit once approved and you've entered Turkey.
Purpose of Visit
a) Employment / Special Employment 
b) Assigned Lecturers / Academics
c) Assigned Sportsperson
d) Assigned Artists
e) Assigned Free Zone Workers
f) Assigned Journalists
g) Montage and Repairman
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Employment Visa (Work Visa) is authorization for a foreigner to legally work in Turkey for a specific employer, requiring both an approved work permit from the Ministry of Labor and a special visa sticker in your passport for entry, usually processed by the employer. It's tied to a job offer, and the Turkish company sponsors the work permit application on your behalf after you get the job, making the permit serve as your residence permit once approved and you've entered Turkey.

a) Employment / Special Employment 
b) Assigned Lecturers / Academics
c) Assigned Sportsperson
d) Assigned Artists
e) Assigned Free Zone Workers
f) Assigned Journalists
g) Montage and Repairman

- It is to be taken without headgear, hat/cap and spectacles.

## Processing Time
The time required for the visa application process until issuance, assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of 15 calendar days from the day the application is received.
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Student Visa is a mandatory permit for international students to enter and stay in Turkey for educational purposes, allowing enrolment in universities or courses, and it must be obtained from a Turkish consulate before arrival, leading to a residence permit once in Turkey for the full duration of study.
Key Aspects
Entry and temporary stay for academic programs (bachelor's, master's, PhD, language, vocational) or internships.
Purpose of Visit
a) Internship Visa
b) Internship ERASMUS
c) Internship AISEC
d) Turkish Language Course Purpose
e) Course Purpose
f) Education Purpose
g) Education in Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus
h) Internship IAESTE

- Download the Undertaking and Information Form from the website. 
- Fill in all required fields accurately and completely. 
- Print the form once it is fully completed. 
- Provide a wet (handwritten) signature on the designated section of the form. 
- Bring the original signed form with you when visiting the Visa Application Centre (VAC) for your appointment.
